page: Microsoft Azure NG8ads_V620_v1 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the NGADSV620v1 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 AMD processor with 8 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core.

This instance is equipped with a fractional GPU configuration, providing 0.25 of an AMD V620 GPU with 7 GB of dedicated VRAM. For local storage, the server includes 1222 GB of local disk capacity and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk attachments. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the fractional GPU allocation and the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance offers a cost-effective entry point for workloads requiring hardware acceleration without the expense of a full dedicated GPU. The combination of dedicated AMD CPU cores, local storage, and fractional GPU resources makes this server suitable for light GPU-accelerated tasks, remote desktop hosting, basic machine learning inference, and graphics-aligned development environments.
description: Microsoft Azure NG8ads_V620_v1 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the NGADSV620v1 family, powered by an AMD processor and running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 8 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. It includes a fractional GPU configuration consisting of 0.25 of a V620 GPU with 7 GB of VRAM. Storage capabilities include 1222 GB of local disk space alongside premium storage compatibility. This hardware profile provides a balanced, cost-efficient option for workloads requiring moderate GPU acceleration without the overhead of a full GPU. It is suited for tasks such as light graphics rendering, development environments, and basic machine learning inference.
